raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white cabinet with a black handle is on a wooden surface. A green light is visible on the cabinet's front panel. The cabinet is rigid with a flat front. **STRATEGY -** Reach the cabinet front, push the handle to open the door, then reach for the green light to turn it off. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1 reach cabinet body; Step 2 grasp handle for secure hold; Step 3 push handle to open; Step 4 reach light; Step 5 press light to turn off.

Goal: off(green_light)
Scene: white_cabinet, green_light
Step 1: reach(white_cabinet)
  affordance_region: the body of the white cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_cabinet, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_cabinet) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_cabinet)
  affordance_region: the black handle of the white cabinet
  contact: holding(white_cabinet) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_cabinet)
Step 3: push(white_cabinet)
  affordance_region: the black handle of the white cabinet
  contact: pushing(handle) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: open(white_cabinet)
Step 4: reach(green_light)
  affordance_region: the green light on the white cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_light, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_light) < 0.03
Step 5: press(green_light)
  affordance_region: the green light on the white cabinet
  contact: pressing(green_light) [completion]
  done_when: off(green_light)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white cabinet
the black handle of the white cabinet
the black handle of the white cabinet
the green light on the white cabinet
the green light on the white cabinet
